rules: Do not introduce characters as models
Show distance through behavior and framing

cuts.intent: Blue hour world tone before the characters appear.
cuts.prompt: Japanese blue hour street after rain, quiet empty walkway, soft city lights, cinematic 85mm, Kodak Vision3, natural contrast, static camera, gentle atmosphere, no people

cuts.intent: The man's loneliness appears through his gaze.
cuts.prompt: [MALE_REF] young Japanese man in dark plaid overshirt and jeans stands alone at blue hour, looking past the camera, restrained loneliness, cinematic 85mm, shallow depth, natural skin

cuts.intent: The woman exists in the same emotional weather, still separate.
cuts.prompt: [FEMALE_REF] young Japanese woman in cream cardigan and gray pleated skirt stands separately at blue hour, hands behind her back, quiet hesitation, soft warm skin, cinematic 85mm

cuts.intent: Make the distance physical and visible.
cuts.prompt: [MALE_REF] [FEMALE_REF] two young Japanese people separated across a quiet blue hour street, visible distance between them, restrained emotion, cinematic wide vertical frame
[MALE_REF] young man almost turns toward someone offscreen, stops before speaking, hand in pocket, quiet hesitation, blue hour side light, realistic cinematic close shot
[MALE_REF] young man speaks softly toward someone offscreen, not looking directly at camera, vulnerable but restrained, warm skin, shallow focus, cinematic realism
[FEMALE_REF] young woman silently receives words from offscreen, eyes lower then return gently, cream cardigan, blue hour background, emotional restraint, cinematic close-up
Symbolic memory insert, empty bench at blue hour, two faint reflections separated in glass, quiet urban night, Kodak Vision3, shallow depth, no characters visible

cuts.intent: Unsaid feeling appears in the hand.
cuts.prompt: [FEMALE_REF] close-up of young woman's hand lightly gripping cardigan sleeve, then relaxing, quiet unsaid feeling, warm skin, shallow focus, cinematic detail shot

cuts.intent: The first visible change in distance.
cuts.prompt: [MALE_REF] [FEMALE_REF] two people in the same quiet space, one takes a small step closer while distance remains, blue hour, restrained cinematic wide shot
[FEMALE_REF] young woman almost speaks, lips part slightly, then she holds silence, soft side light, shallow focus, emotional hesitation, realistic cinematic close-up

cuts.intent: A quiet truth without explaining everything.
cuts.prompt: [FEMALE_REF] young woman speaks softly toward someone offscreen, quiet truth without explanation, cream cardigan, blue hour, warm skin, cinematic 85mm close-up
[MALE_REF] young man absorbs her words in silence, eyes shift then settle, dark plaid shirt, soft blue hour background, restrained afterglow, cinematic close-up
[MALE_REF] [FEMALE_REF] two young people stand closer than before, bodies angled toward each other, still not touching, quiet emotional shift, cinematic vertical medium-wide

cuts.intent: Let the emotion breathe outside the characters.
cuts.prompt: Blue hour atmosphere shot, distant streetlight, soft wind through curtain or passing train light, quiet city texture, Kodak Vision3, natural contrast, emotional pause
[MALE_REF] young man decides to close the distance, small inhale before moving, restrained face, blue hour side light, cinematic 85mm, realistic emotion
[MALE_REF] [FEMALE_REF] close two-shot of young Japanese couple in quiet blue hour, close enough to share warmth but still restrained, emotional afterglow, cinematic realism
